Preconditions: User is logged in and has an active order
Steps: 1. Navigate to 'My Orders'\n2. Click on the tracking link for an order
Expected Result: Current order status (e.g., Processing, Shipped) is displayed correctly

Steps: 1. Click on a specific order from the list\n2. Review the order items and tracking updates
Expected Result: Detailed order information and history of status changes are shown

Steps: 1. Navigate to 'Order Management' in Admin dashboard\n2. Select an order\n3. Change status from 'Processing' to 'Shipped'
Expected Result: Order status is successfully updated and visible to the customer

Steps: 1. Enter a valid Order ID in the search bar\n2. Submit search
Expected Result: The specific order is found and its tracking details are displayed

Preconditions: Guest or User is at tracking page
Steps: 1. Enter a non-existent Order ID\n2. Click 'Track'
Expected Result: A clear error message 'Order not found' should be displayed
